description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The property features a spacious backyard with a large green lawn bordered by a tall privacy fence, and a paved patio area with palm trees. The main building is complemented by a detached structure, likely a garage or guest house, which also has a flat roof and large windows. The house includes a swimming pool surrounded by a tiled deck, and the main entryway is accentuated by a set of steps and a minimalist overhang. Large windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, giving the house a sleek and contemporary appearance.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a detached garage, a swimming pool, and a spacious backyard with a privacy fence and palm trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the side, highlighting the swimming pool, the detached garage, and the large backyard with a privacy fence.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear of the house, emphasizing the expansive green lawn, the back facade with many windows, and the pool area.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the opposite side, focusing on the paved patio, palm trees, and the flat-roofed main and detached buildings.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the front of the house, featuring the main entryway with steps, the paved driveway, and the symmetrical arrangement of palm trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some symmetrical rows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, minimalist overhang, and flanked by palm trees; simple modern door with no ornate features.
